privileged_info_summary: The timezone_meeting_finder task involves 5 team members across global timezones (New York UTC-5, London UTC+0, Tokyo UTC+9, Sydney UTC+11, Los Angeles UTC-8) with locally specified availability windows. All timezone offsets are verified correct (EST, GMT, JST, AEDT, PST respectively). The UTC conversion formulas specified in the verifier are mathematically correct. However, a CRITICAL FLAW exists: when all team members' local availability is converted to UTC, there is NO 2-hour window where all 5 participants are available simultaneously. The most restrictive overlap is between Alex (14-22 UTC) and Priya (8-16 UTC) yielding only 14-16 UTC, but Kenji (1-9 UTC), Carlos (18-2 UTC), and Sophie (22-6 UTC) are all unavailable during this window. The README incorrectly claims a solution exists 'likely around 16:00-18:00 UTC' but this time is invalid for all participants. The task is fundamentally impossible as designed. Data is synthetic, created programmatically during setup.
